generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are still relying on outdated systems while we modernize? Supporting alliances isn't just about spending - it's about ensuring our partners can actually contribute. The real security risk is assuming others will step up without us leading by example. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
